title: nabalus altissimus var. cordatus
intro: Nabalus altissimus var. cordatus, also known as the tall ragwort or tall silkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the plant include relief from pain and swelling, as well as its ability to treat skin conditions and wounds. Nabalus altissimus var. cordatus can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve for various herbal applications.
